title: RunItem
description: Represents a Warp Oz cloud agent run, including its state, metadata, and execution details.

task_id.description: Unique identifier for the task (typically matches run_id). Deprecated — use run_id instead.

execution_location.description: Where the run is being executed (cloud or self-hosted)

prompt.description: The prompt/instruction given to the agent

created_at.description: Timestamp when the run was created (RFC3339)

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the run was last updated (RFC3339)

started_at.description: Timestamp when the agent started working on the run (RFC3339)

run_time.description: Total runtime as an ISO 8601 duration (e.g. PT2M30S)

status_message.description: Human-readable status message for the run

session_id.description: UUID of the shared session (if available)

session_link.description: URL to view the agent session

trigger_url.description: URL to the run trigger (e.g. Slack thread, Linear issue, schedule)

conversation_id.description: UUID of the conversation associated with the run

creator.description: Information about who created the run

executor.description: Information about who executed the run (may differ from creator for agent identities)

request_usage.description: Token and cost usage for the run

schedule.description: Schedule information if the run was triggered by a schedule
